experience.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Extracted and manipulated data using SQL to create insightful reports.
Developed interactive dashboards using Tableau for various healthcare projects.
Conducted statistical analysis to identify trends in patient care and outcomes.
Collaborated with clinical staff to gather data from Electronic Health Records (EHR).
Performed data quality assessments and ensured compliance with healthcare regulations.

experience.title: Junior Data Analyst
responsibilities: Assisted in data collection and cleaning processes.
Utilized Excel for data manipulation and analysis.
Presented analytical findings to stakeholders in a clear and concise manner.

response.summary: Data analyst with a passion for leveraging data to improve healthcare outcomes. Experienced in SQL, Tableau, and statistical analysis, with a strong ability to communicate findings to diverse audiences.
